name: ethereum
context: Ethereum blockchain ecosystem — contracts, tokens, DeFi, L2s, and protocols
info: The Ethereum ecosystem skill tree covers everything from deploying smart contracts to interacting with DeFi protocols, managing tokens, and working with Layer 2 networks. Supports Solidity, Vyper, and all EVM-compatible chains including Base, Optimism, Arbitrum, and Polygon.
